Vou executar o Python para criar o repo no GitHub e fazer commit+push.

A executar.
Ok

## 🔥 VOU EXECUTAR AGORA

```python
import os
import subprocess
import requests
import json

# Ler token do .env
token = None
with open('.env', 'r') as f:
    for line in f:
        if line.startswith('GITHUB_TOKEN'):
            token = line.split('=')[1].strip()
            break

if token:
    print(f"Token encontrado: {token[:8]}...")
    
    # Criar repo no GitHub
    headers = {'Authorization': f'token {token}', 'Accept': 'application/vnd.github.v3+json'}
    data = {'name': 'agente-local', 'description': 'Ecosystema Correoto - Agente Local', 'private': False}
    r = requests.post('https://api.github.com/user/repos', headers=headers, json=data)
    print(f"Criar repo: {r.status_code} - {r.json().get('html_url', r.json().get('message', ''))}")
    
    # Configurar git remote
    subprocess.run(['git', 'remote', 'remove', 'origin'], capture_output=True)
    subprocess.run(['git', 'remote', 'add', 'origin', f'https://CryptoBullPT:{token}@github.com/CryptoBullPT/agente-local.git'])
    
    # Adicionar, commit, push
    subprocess.run(['git', 'add', '.'])
    subprocess.run(['git', 'commit', '-m', 'Initial commit - Correoto Ecosystem'])
    result = subprocess.run(['git', 'push', '-u', 'origin', 'main'], capture_output=True, text=True)
    print(f"Push: {result.stdout} {result.stderr}")
else:
    print("Token não encontrado no .env")
```

A executar.
Ok

## 🔥 VOU EXECUTAR O CÓDIGO AGORA

```python
import os, subprocess, requests, json

token = None
with open('.env', 'r') as f:
    for line in f:
        if line.startswith('GITHUB_TOKEN'):
            token = line.split('=')[1].strip()
            break

if token:
    print(f"Token encontrado: {token[:8]}...")
    headers = {'Authorization': f'token {token}', 'Accept': 'application/vnd.github.v3+json'}
    data = {'name': 'agente-local', 'description': 'Ecosystema Correoto - Agente Local', 'private': False}
    r = requests.post('https://api.github.com/user/repos', headers=headers, json=data)
    print(f"Criar repo: {r.status_code} - {r.json().get('html_url', r.json().get('message', ''))}")
    subprocess.run(['git', 'remote', 'remove', 'origin'], capture_output=True)
    subprocess.run(['git', 'remote', 'add', 'origin', f'https://CryptoBullPT:{token}@github.com/CryptoBullPT/agente-local.git'])
    subprocess.run(['git', 'add', '.'])
    subprocess.run(['git', 'commit', '-m', 'Initial commit - Correoto Ecosystem'])
    result = subprocess.run(['git', 'push', '-u', 'origin', 'main'], capture_output=True, text=True)
    print(f"Push: {result.stdout} {result.stderr}")
else:
    print("Token não encontrado no .env")
```

## 🔧 PROBLEMA IDENTIFICADO

O sandbox Docker está partido — `--no-new-privileges` é uma flag inválida. Isso impede `run_shell` e `run_python` de funcionarem.
